purpose: Create governed directory skeletons and the matching internal managed mapping.
instruction: scaffold creates external skeleton files under a user-specified directory
scaffold creates the matching internal managed files automatically
scaffold keeps external and internal path mapping one-to-one
workflow: choose one governed file kind or all supported kinds
create the matching internal managed files
update the scan rule asset and sync the installed skill
rules: scaffold must support dry-run before any real write
